meta.name: Wave 1f — European Cup semi-finalists 1970-71 to 1979-80 (pickable)
meta.note: Promotes 20 1970s European Cup semi-finalist club-seasons to full pickable squads. Famous sides conf B; smaller-nation sides conf C (spine accurate, fringe approximate). Saint-Étienne 1974-75 spine web-verified; 1975-76 already in seed pack. Decoys auto-selected from era/league reserves.
